text: Welcome to this multi-part video series on a comprehensive and deep dive into a robotic ascending colectomy.
This video series will cover instrument selection, patient positioning, port placement for both SI and XI robotic systems, exhaustive review of procedure choreography, various intracorporeal and
Sutra selection and nice deep dive into the pitfalls and traps to avoid during this operation.
Stick around and hit the subscribe button as content will be added to this series as the days progress.
